response:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "CommandRouter",
      "purpose": "Parse the input command and route to the appropriate handler",
      "behavior": "Reads the 'command' field from input JSON, then dispatches to the corresponding child function (e.g., CreateOrderHandler, PayOrderHandler, etc.) based on the command string.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the create_order command: validate user, check stock, calculate total, deduct stock, create order record",
      "behavior": "Checks user existence in users store, checks product stock in products store, calculates total price from product prices and quantities, deducts stock from products store, creates a new order record in orders store with status 'pending', and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "PayOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the pay_order command: validate order, check user balance, deduct balance, update order status",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is 'pending' in orders store, checks user balance in users store, deducts balance from users store, updates order status to 'paid' in orders store, and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the ship_order command: validate order and update status to shipped",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is 'paid' in orders store, updates order status to 'shipped' in orders store, and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the complete_order command: validate order and update status to completed",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is 'shipped' in orders store, updates order status to 'completed' in orders store, and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the cancel_order command: validate order, restore stock, refund if paid, update status",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is 'pending' or 'paid' in orders store, restores product stock in products store, if status was 'paid' refunds user balance in users store, updates order status to 'cancelled' in orders store, and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the list_orders command: list orders with optional filters",
      "behavior": "Reads optional filters (user, status) from order_data, queries orders store, filters orders accordingly, and returns the list in data field.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the get_user_orders command: get all orders for a user, calculate total spent and status distribution",
      "behavior": "Reads user_id from order_data, queries orders store for all orders of that user, calculates total spent (sum of total_price for non-cancelled orders) and status distribution (count per status), and returns these in data field.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListProductsHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the list_products command: list products with stock, optionally filter low stock",
      "behavior": "Reads optional low_stock_threshold from order_data, queries products store, filters products with stock below threshold if provided, and returns the list in data field.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "decomposition_rationale": "The Order Management System is decomposed into a CommandRouter that dispatches to nine distinct handlers, each responsible for a specific command (create, pay, ship, complete, cancel, list orders, get user orders, list products). This keeps each child at the same abstraction level (command handling) and avoids cross-calls between siblings, as the parent (CommandRouter) directly invokes the appropriate handler based on the command. The handlers are minimally overlapping, each focusing on a single functional requirement.",
  "dataflow_edges": [
    {
      "from_node": "parent",
      "from_output": "input",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "input",
      "note": "Pass the entire input JSON to the router for command parsing"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route create_order command with its data"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "PayOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route pay_order command with its data"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route ship_order command with its data"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route complete_order command with its data"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route cancel_order command with its data"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route list_orders command with its data"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route get_user_orders command with its data"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command and order_data",
      "to_node": "ListProductsHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route list_products command with its data"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Return success/failure and data to parent"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "PayOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Return success/failure and data to parent"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Return success/failure and data to parent"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Return success/failure and data to parent"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Return success/failure and data to parent"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Return success/failure and data to parent"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Return success/failure and data to parent"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListProductsHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Return success/failure and data to parent"
    }
  ]
}
